Activity/Task: - Product Owner (Mentor): Maximizes product value and manages the Product Backlog
- Scrum Master (PM): Facilitates Scrum events and removes impediments
- Development Team (4 DEVs): Self-organizing team that delivers potentially shippable increments
- Multiple assignments (e.g. A/R) mean the role has both responsibilities
